serverInfo.name: kopern
serverInfo.title: Kopern — AI Agent Builder
serverInfo.description: Build, grade, and deploy AI agents. Chat with agents, evaluate system prompts against 6 quality criteria, browse 37 ready-to-use templates, and manage your agent fleet — all via MCP.

authentication.instructions: Create an API key at kopern.ai → Agent → MCP/API tab. Keys start with 'kpn_'. Pass via Authorization: Bearer kpn_...

tools.name: kopern_chat
tools.description: Send a message to your Kopern agent and get a response. The agent may use its internal tools (GitHub, web fetch, code interpreter, email, calendar, etc.) to answer.

tools.name: kopern_agent_info
tools.description: Get metadata about the connected agent (name, description, model, domain, configuration).

tools.name: kopern_list_templates
tools.description: List all 37 available AI agent templates (28 general + 9 vertical/business). Returns slug, title, domain, tagline. No LLM cost.

tools.name: kopern_grade_prompt
tools.description: Grade an AI system prompt against test cases. Runs the agent with each input and evaluates using 6 criteria types (output_match, schema_validation, tool_usage, safety_check, custom_script, llm_judge). Returns score 0-1. Uses YOUR API keys.

tools.name: kopern_list_agents
tools.description: List all your Kopern agents with name, description, model, domain, latest grading score. No LLM cost.
